meaning: Order of St. Augustine (天主教)奥斯定会
examples: Motor-vehicle crashes are another risk in people with OSA.
OSA boosts risks of heart disease, stroke, and premature death.
In 1966 Hubbard created his own "intelligence" organization, called the "Guardian Office" (GO) [now called OSA].
An American expat, Lana educates guests by explaining the importance of ecotourism and preservation in Osa.
Unai Osa finished last year's race 18th in the GC, with Dariusz Baranowski marginally further back in 24th.
